title: Mahuli Fort
tagline: Mahuli Fort — heritage city of Maharashtra

overview.short: Mahuli is an hill fort based in the Indian state of Maharashtra, covering about 6km.
overview.description: Mahuli is an hill fort based in the Indian state of Maharashtra, covering about 6km. It is approximately 75km north-east of Mumbai in the 421601 postcode.

nearestAirport.name: Chhatrapati Shivaji Maharaj International Airport, Mumbai

howToReach.roadNote: Roads are generally good; check seasonal/monsoon conditions before high-altitude or remote stretches.

topPlaces.name: Tansa Wildlife Sanctuary
topPlaces.description: The Tansa Wildlife Sanctuary is located in Shahapur and Bhiwandi taluka of Thane district and Wada taluka of Palghar district. The sanctuary is spread over an area of 320 km2.

topPlaces.name: Vasind
topPlaces.description: Vasind is a city in Shahapur taluka of Thane district in the Indian state of Maharashtra. It is suburban city of Mumbai.Mumbai-Vasind distance is about 63.1 km.

topPlaces.name: Taharpur, Thane
topPlaces.description: Taharpur is a village in Thane district of Maharashtra State, India. Aghai is a nearby village.

topPlaces.name: Pundhe
topPlaces.description: Pundhe is a small village in Shahapur taluka of Thane district, Maharashtra, India. It is situated on Mumbai Nashik Express Way.

topPlaces.name: Kasane, Bhiwandi
topPlaces.description: Kasane is a village in the Thane district of Maharashtra, India. It is located in the Bhiwandi taluka.

topPlaces.name: Tansa Dam
topPlaces.description: Tansa dam, is an earthfill and gravity dam on Tansa river near Mumbai, Thane district in the state of Maharashtra in India. The dam is one of the seven sources of drinking water to the city of Mumbai.

topPlaces.name: Shahapur (Thane)
topPlaces.description: Shahapur is a town and census town in Thane district, Maharashtra, India. It is a part of the Mumbai Metropolitan Region (MMR) and is governed by the Shahapur Municipal Council.

topPlaces.name: Talavali Tarf Rahur
topPlaces.description: Talavali Tarf Rahur is a village in the Thane district of Maharashtra, India. It is located in the Bhiwandi taluka.

faq.q: What is the best time to visit Mahuli Fort?
faq.a: The best time to visit Mahuli Fort is Oct – Mar. Summers are 26–40°C and winters are 12–28°C.

faq.q: How do I reach Mahuli Fort?
faq.a: The nearest airport is Chhatrapati Shivaji Maharaj International Airport, Mumbai (59 km) and the nearest railway station is Kalyan Junction (Mumbai) (30 km). Roads are generally good; check seasonal/monsoon conditions before high-altitude or remote stretches.

faq.q: How many days are enough for Mahuli Fort?
faq.a: 3 days are usually enough to cover the top attractions of Mahuli Fort at a relaxed pace.

faq.q: How much does a hotel cost in Mahuli Fort?
faq.a: Stays in Mahuli Fort start from ₹900 per night, with options across 4 price categories.

faq.q: What are the top places to visit in Mahuli Fort?
faq.a: The top attractions are Tansa Wildlife Sanctuary, Vasind, Taharpur, Thane, Pundhe, Kasane, Bhiwandi.
